dashboard.label: CAM — HNDL Detection
dashboard.description: Harvest-Now-Decrypt-Later anomaly detection on encrypted egress.

search.query: | index=crypto_hndl sourcetype=cam:hndl_event | stats max(deviation) as max_dev
| index=crypto_hndl sourcetype=cam:hndl_event | sort - deviation | table _time, dst, asn, geo, volume, baseline, deviation, sessions, status, note
